subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto her who was set ablaze with the fire of God when she appeared from the Lote-Tree planted by the hand of grace in this Ridván [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی اشتعلت بنار الله اذ ظهرت من سدره غرست بید الفضل فیهذا الرضوان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @praise and encouragement
